static.name: Teck Resources Limited
static.description: Teck Resources Limited engages in research, exploration, development, processing, smelting, refining, and reclamation of mineral properties in Asia, the Americas, and Europe. It operates through Copper and Zinc segments. The company offers copper, zinc, and lead concentrates, as well as refined zinc, lead, and silver. It also produces lead, precious metals, molybdenum, fertilizers, and other metals; and sells refined metals or concentrates. In addition, it explores for gold. The company was formerly known as Teck Cominco Limited and changed its name to Teck Resources Limited in April 2009. Teck Resources Limited was founded in 1913 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.

claude.thesis: Critical minerals (germanium for IR optics, indium for solar cells) used in satellites. Critical minerals but not differentiated for space.

news.headline: Anglo American to Sell Australian Steelmaking Coal Assets for Up to $3.875 Billion
news.summary: The sale will complete Anglo American’s exit from steelmaking coal and is part of a drive to simplify its portfolio ahead of a merger with Teck Resources.

news.headline: Anglo American to sell Australian steelmaking coal mines for £2.9bn
news.summary: The FTSE 100 commodities giant said it will sell the operations to fellow UK-based miner Dhilmar.

news.headline: Canada open to deeper U.S.-Mexico trade ties in strategic sectors
news.summary: Investing.com -- Prime Minister Mark Carney indicated on Saturday that Canada remains open to significantly deeper trade integration with the United States and Mexico within specific strategic industries.
